core_payload.content:
# N-Infinity Project

## 1. Definition and Essence
N-Infinity Project is the implementation program that turns the N-Infinity idea into governed runtime lanes, queues, deployment policy, and inspectable swarm economics inside N1Hub.

## 2. Current Program Contract
The real-side project already owns the live program boundary: role design, capsule-job orchestration, daemon bring-up, assignment control, night-shift gating, and risk-aware assistant augmentation across planning, tracking, mining, repository execution, and capsule-graph stewardship. It is not the promise of total autonomy; it is the bounded program that makes autonomy reviewable.

## 3. Core Scope
- `agent_catalog` implemented and planned specialized agents.
- `capsule_job_model` how graph signals become bounded work units.
- `iteration_economics` how high-volume agent throughput is made computationally and financially sustainable.
- `orchestration_policy` delegation, retry, assignment ownership, and conflict resolution rules.
- `safety_controls` Dream-first boundaries and autonomy guardrails.
- `durable_state` memory, cooldown, and resume strategy for long-lived lanes.
- `deployment_model` daemon topology, day/night gating, and future 24/7 expansion.
- `vault_stewardship` how the swarm continuously tends the capsule graph instead of only reacting to external prompts.

## 4. Live Delivery Shape
The current delivery shape is explicit:
- background orchestration runs through Symphony and `NINFINITY_WORKFLOW.md` rather than through hidden perpetual prompts.
- capsule jobs, queue discipline, cooldown policy, and worktree isolation keep swarm work reviewable.
- AI Wallet and provider runtime form the live execution substrate.
- stronger autonomy still expands incrementally through measured lanes rather than in one leap.

## 5. Integration
- **CapsuleOS Project:** child subsystem under core architecture.
- **Foundation N-Infinity:** implemented conceptual swarm model.
- **Vault Stewardship Swarm:** capsule-first maintenance lane already expressing the pattern in practice.
- **DeepMine / A2C:** quarry and refinery that feed swarm work with source pressure and branch-safe artifacts.
- **Symphony:** execution lane for capsule jobs and background orchestration.
- **Background Agent Runtime / Agent Control Plane:** daemon, assignment, and fleet substrate for autonomous work.
- **Personal AI Assistant / Workspace:** primary human-facing partner and habitat surfaces.
- **Human-AI Symbiosis:** keeps the human at the center while swarm throughput scales behind the scenes.

## 6. Philosophical Alignment
Real N-Infinity Project supports To Dig Deep by turning finite human prompting into governed, inspectable machine iteration rather than into uncontrolled swarm mythology.

neuro_concentrate.summary: N-Infinity Project is the real-side implementation program for the autonomous-agent layer above the capsule graph. It organizes role design, capsule-job policy, assignment control, night-shift runtime shaping, safety boundaries, and feedback loops so autonomy expands deliberately instead of leaking into user-facing flows as vague always-on magic. The project matters because it is the current governed path that turns graph-grounded assistance from philosophy into a bounded operating capability for planning, mining, vault stewardship, repository execution, and assistant-backed work.
